3184440.name: Finares
3184440.description:
Who are you?

You are Ares, a dog without a permanent home. At first, your day seemed like any other, you returned from a short trip, only to suddenly find yourself alone. Confused and with little food, you try to come to terms with your situation, but then fate takes a turn: An unfamiliar dog appears in your territory. Find your path through a world abandoned by humans as you search for them. Lead your pack forward.

What can you expect on this journey?

  • Travel through multiple open worlds

  • Listen to local frequencies for signals from humans

  • Find diary entries, notes, laptops, smartphones, and anything that gives you clues about the last thoughts of humans

  • Meet other dogs along the way and exchange information with them

  • Use your nose to track scents and reach new places

  • Open doors, break into houses, and explore the area.

  • Play tag and hide-and-seek

  • Take care of your pack

  • Always have your trailer with you

  • Search for supplies and shelters for the night

  • Solve puzzles to get information

  • Build a relationship with the dogs in your pack.

  • Painted graphics
